top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes as Strait of Hormuz standoff escalates
top_signals.summary: Iran responded to a fresh wave of strikes by U.S. forces by launching an attack on American military bases in several Gulf states.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Global stocks fall and oil prices climb
top_signals.summary: Asian memory chipmakers lead declines as clashes over Strait of Hormuz put investors in ‘risk-off’ mode
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan’s SBI Group to launch JPYSC stablecoin lending service as early as this month: report
top_signals.summary: The SBI's service would offer users a 3% annual yield for deposited JPYSC stablecoins, according to Nikkei.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
